mapper.sql: tpr.employee_id, tpr.plan_id, tpr.attendance, tpr.duration, tpr.grade, tpr.evaluate, tpr.need_flag, tpr.enabled_flag, tpr.id, tpr.create_time, tpr.create_by, tpr.update_time, tpr.update_by, tpr.score_line, tpr.remarks,tpr.match_implement_flag, tpr.check_method

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.plan_id as ${tAlias}_plan_id, ${tAlias}.attendance as ${tAlias}_attendance, ${tAlias}.duration as ${tAlias}_duration, ${tAlias}.grade as ${tAlias}_grade, ${tAlias}.evaluate as ${tAlias}_evaluate, ${tAlias}.need_flag as ${tAlias}_need_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.score_line as ${tAlias}_score_line, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.match_implement_flag as ${tAlias}_match_implement_flag, ${tAlias}.check_method as ${tAlias}_check_method

select
, isnull( pe.work_card, tpr.work_card ) AS work_card, isnull( pe.NAME, tpr.NAME ) AS NAME, isnull( pe.id_number, '' ) AS id_number, fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team, 0 AS edit_flag, tpec.start_time AS contract_start_date, tpec.end_time AS contract_end_date, CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM td_plan_agreement tpa WHERE tpa.employee_id = tpr.employee_id AND tpa.plan_id = tpr.plan_id AND tpa.enabled_flag = 1 AND tpr.enabled_flag = 1 and tpa.check_method = tpr.check_method ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS have_agreement_flag FROM td_plan_result tpr LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id = tpr.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pe.id = pej.employee_id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev ON pej.dept_id = fdev.id AND fdev.enabled_flag = 1 AND fdev.deleted_flag = 0 OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP ( 1 ) pec.* FROM pm_employee_contract pec WHERE pec.employee_id = tpr.employee_id AND pec.enabled_flag = 1 AND new_contract_flag = 1 ) tpec WHERE tpr.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_result (employee_id, plan_id, attendance, duration, grade, evaluate, need_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, score_line, remarks, name, work_card, match_implement_flag, check_method ) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attendance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{grade,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{evaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scoreLine, jdbcType=DOUBLE} , #{remarks , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{matchImplementFlag, jdbcType=BIT} , #{checkMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR})

insert into td_plan_result (employee_id, plan_id, attendance, duration, grade, evaluate, need_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, score_line, name, work_card, match_implement_flag, remarks, check_method) select tpri.employee_id , tpri.plan_id , tpri.attendance, tpri.duration, tpri.grade, tpri.evaluate, tpri.need_flag , 1, tpri.create_time, tpri.create_by, tpri.update_time, tpri.update_by, tpri.score_line, tpri.name , tpri.work_card, tpri.match_implement_flag, tpri.remarks, tpri.check_method from td_plan_result_interface tpri where tpri.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and tpri.data_status = 'T'
mapper.update: update td_plan_result set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attendance = #{attendance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, evaluate = #{evaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, need_flag = #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, score_line = #{scoreLine, jdbcType = DOUBLE}, remarks = #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, match_implement_flag = #{matchImplementFlag, jdbcType=BIT}, check_method = #{checkMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select td.training_name as training_name, td.training_method as training_method, td.training_content as training_content, tpi.check_method as check_method,
CASE
WHEN isnull( tpi.out_teacher, '' ) = '' THEN ( SELECT STUFF(( SELECT ',' + pe.name FROM pm_employee pe JOIN td_plan_employee tpe ON pe.id = tpe.employee_id AND tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id AND tpe.enabled_flag = 1 AND tpe.type = 'teacher' WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 FOR XML PATH ( '' )), 1, 1, '' ) ) ELSE ( SELECT tpi.out_teacher + '，' + STUFF(( SELECT ',' + pe.name FROM pm_employee pe JOIN td_plan_employee tpe ON pe.id = tpe.employee_id AND tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id AND tpe.enabled_flag = 1 AND tpe.type = 'teacher' WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 FOR XML PATH ( '' )), 1, 1, '' ) ) END AS teacher, tpi.training_address as training_address, tpi.training_time_quantity as training_time_quantity, td.employee_quantity as employee_quantity,
( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS department, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS team, pe.name as name, isnull(tpr.duration, 0) as duration, isnull(tpr.evaluate, 0) as evaluate, isnull(tpr.grade, 0) as grade , tpr.score_line as score_line, tpi.begin_date as begin_date, tpi.end_date as end_date, temp.pass_number as pass_number, pe.id as id
FROM td_plan td JOIN td_plan_implement tpi ON td.id = tpi.plan_id AND td.enabled_flag = 1 AND td.show_flag = 1 and td.safety_training_flag = 0 AND tpi.enabled_flag = 1 AND tpi.approval_status = '已完成' JOIN td_plan_employee tpe ON tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id AND tpe.type = 'employee' AND tpe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tpe.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 join fnd_dept fd on fd.id = pej.dept_id and fd.deleted_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN td_plan_result tpr ON tpr.plan_id = td.id AND tpr.employee_id = tpe.employee_id
left join (
select count(tpr.plan_id) as pass_number, tpr.plan_id as plan_id from td_plan tp JOIN td_plan_implement tpi ON tp.id = tpi.plan_id AND tpi.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.safety_training_flag = 0 AND tpi.approval_status = '已完成'
and tpi.begin_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} and tpi.end_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
left join td_plan_result tpr on tp.id = tpr.plan_id and tp.show_flag = 1 AND tp.enabled_flag = 1 where tpr.grade >= isnull(tpr.score_line, 0) and tpr.enabled_flag = 1 GROUP BY tpr.plan_id ) temp on temp.plan_id = td.id
where tpr.enabled_flag = 1
and tpi.begin_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} and tpi.end_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
order by td.id,fd.dept_name,pe.work_card

SELECT ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS department, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS team, dept_menber.dept_menber_count AS dept_menber_count, fd.id, isnull( temp2.plan_menber, 0 ) AS plan_menber, isnull( temp2.duration, 0 ) AS duration, isnull( temp2.grade, 0 ) AS grade, isnull( temp2.evaluate, 0 ) AS evaluate, isnull( temp2.main_plan_count, 0 ) AS main_plan_count, isnull( temp2.main_plan_pass_count, 0 ) AS main_plan_pass_count
,#{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} as begin_date, #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} as end_date
FROM ( SELECT fd.id AS id, count( isnull( pej.id, - 1 ) ) AS dept_menber_count FROM fnd_dept fd LEFT OUTER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.dept_id = fd.id join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id = pe.id WHERE fd.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 GROUP BY fd.id ) dept_menber JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = dept_menber.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count( DISTINCT pej.employee_id ) AS plan_menber, pej.dept_id AS dept_id, sum(isnull( tpr.duration, 0 ) ) AS duration, sum(isnull( tpr.grade, 0 ) ) AS grade, sum(tpr.evaluate ) AS evaluate, ( SELECT count( temp_tp.host_dept_id ) FROM td_plan temp_tp WHERE temp_tp.host_dept_id = pej.dept_id AND temp_tp.enabled_flag = 1 AND temp_tp.show_flag = 1 and temp_tp.safety_training_flag = 0 ) AS main_plan_count, ( SELECT count( temp_tp.host_dept_id ) FROM td_plan temp_tp WHERE temp_tp.host_dept_id = pej.dept_id AND temp_tp.enabled_flag = 1 AND temp_tp.show_flag = 1 AND temp_tp.plan_status = '实施审批通过' and temp_tp.safety_training_flag = 0 ) AS main_plan_pass_count FROM td_plan td JOIN td_plan_implement tpi ON td.id = tpi.plan_id AND td.enabled_flag = 1 AND td.show_flag = 1 and td.safety_training_flag = 0 AND tpi.enabled_flag = 1 AND tpi.approval_status = '已完成'
AND tpi.begin_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} AND #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE} AND tpi.end_date BETWEEN #{beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} AND #{endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
JOIN td_plan_employee tpe ON tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id AND tpe.type = 'employee' AND tpe.enabled_flag = 1 JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = tpe.employee_id AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN td_plan_result tpr ON tpr.plan_id = td.id AND tpr.employee_id = tpe.employee_id WHERE tpr.enabled_flag = 1 GROUP BY pej.dept_id ) temp2 ON fd.id = temp2.dept_id ORDER BY dept_name, department, team

select tp.training_name, tpi.begin_date, tpi.end_date, tp.training_content, tpr.remarks from td_plan_result tpr join pm_employee pe on tpr.employee_id = pe.id and tpr.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join td_plan tp on tp.id = tpr.plan_id and tp.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.safety_training_flag = 0 join td_plan_implement tpi on tp.id = tpi.plan_id and tpi.enabled_flag = 1 where pe.id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}

select pe.id as employee_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, tp.training_name) > 0 then tp.training_name else null end as training_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, tp.training_content) > 0 then tp.training_content else null end as training_content from td_plan_result tpr join pm_employee pe on tpr.employee_id = pe.id and tpr.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join td_plan tp on tp.id = tpr.plan_id and tp.enabled_flag = 1 and tp.safety_training_flag = 0 join td_plan_implement tpi on tp.id = tpi.plan_id and tpi.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( tp.training_name,tp.training_content ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
